bot_token: <Telegram bot token from @BotFather — or set env TURO_BOT_TOKEN>
chat_id: <your Telegram chat id — or set env TURO_CHAT_ID>
signature: <first name that signs every guest reply, e.g. Alex>
host_names: <each Turo host account you co-host for, exactly as the inbox shows it, e.g. 'Jane D' or 'Sample Owner LLC.'>
